name: AI/ML API
tagline: Access multiple AI models through one OpenAI-compatible API
description: Generate chat completions with models from multiple providers through AI/ML API's OpenAI-compatible REST interface. Requires an AI/ML API key and available account credit.

auth.hint: Generate an AI/ML API key and send it as Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_AIMLAPI_KEY>. Store only the token value in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: create_chat_completion
tools.description: Send a conversation to a selected AI model and return the generated assistant message plus token usage.

params.name: model
params.description: Model identifier supported by AI/ML API, for example google/gemma-3-4b-it.

params.name: messages
params.description: Conversation messages in chronological order, each containing a role and content.

params.name: temperature
params.description: Sampling temperature supported by the selected model; the quickstart example uses 0.7.

params.name: max_tokens
params.description: Maximum generated tokens; keep within the selected model's documented limit.
